entity.summary: Gamified automated-market-maker decentralized exchange on Somnia mainnet providing token swaps, liquidity pools, fee earning, rewards, and game-linked engagement features through a current self-custody application.
entity.notes: Current first-party application exposes Somnia mainnet swaps and liquidity interfaces. Official Somnia ecosystem documentation independently identifies the venue and its current trading, liquidity, reward, and gamification functions. No exact launch date, legal entity, or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Somnia Exchange application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application exposes wallet connection, Somnia mainnet token swaps, liquidity navigation, and the exchange's active protocol identity.

evidence.title: Somnia ecosystem guide to Somnia Exchange
evidence.notes: Official network documentation identifies Somnia Exchange as a gamified DEX and documents token swaps, liquidity pools, rewards, and current trading pairs.
